Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class RecordPrinter

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.RecordPrinter
public class RecordPrinter extends Object
A class for easier development of toString() methods for debugging purposes. It is particularly useful on deeply structured objects. Newlines are printed lazily, that is only when followed by some other string.

    dedent()
    Decreases the indentation level of subsequent lines.
    RecordPrinter
    indent()
    Increases the indentation level of subsequent lines.

    print(String name, E[] values)
    Prints the field with the given name and array of values, followed by a new line indication.
    RecordPrinter
    print(String name, Object value)
    Prints the field with the given name and value on one line, followed by a new line indication.

  • Method Details

    • println

      public RecordPrinter println(Object value)
      Prints the string representation of the given object, followed by a newline indication.
      Parameters:
      value - the object to print
      Returns:
      this printer

    • indent

      public RecordPrinter indent()
      Increases the indentation level of subsequent lines.
      Returns:
      this printer

    • dedent

      public RecordPrinter dedent()
      Decreases the indentation level of subsequent lines.
      Returns:
      this printer

    • print

      public RecordPrinter print(String name, Object value)
      Prints the field with the given name and value on one line, followed by a new line indication.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the field
      value - the value of the field
      Returns:
      this printer

    • printRec

      public <E> RecordPrinter printRec(String name, Collection<E> values)
      Prints the field with the given name and collection of values, followed by a new line indication. The values are printed by reflection. Each value must implement the print(RecordPrinter) method for printing itself.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the field
      values - the values of the field
      Returns:
      this printer

    • printRec

      public <E> RecordPrinter printRec(String name, E[] values)
      Prints the field with the given name and array of values, followed by a new line indication. The values are printed by reflection. Each value must implement the print(RecordPrinter) method for printing itself.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the field
      values - the values of the field
      Returns:
      this printer

    • printLines

      public <E> RecordPrinter printLines(String name, Collection<E> values)
      Prints the field with the given name and collection of values, followed by a new line indication. The values are printed one per line, with increased indentation.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the field
      values - the values of the field
      Returns:
      this printer

    • printLines

      public <E> RecordPrinter printLines(String name, E[] values)
      Prints the field with the given name and array of values, followed by a new line indication. The values are printed one per line, with increased indentation.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the field
      values - the values of the field
      Returns:
      this printer

    • print

      public <E> RecordPrinter print(String name, Collection<E> values)
      Prints the field with the given name and collection of values, followed by a new line indication. The name and values are all printed on the same line. The values are separated by commas.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the field
      values - the values of the field
      Returns:
      this printer

    • print

      public <E> RecordPrinter print(String name, E[] values)
      Prints the field with the given name and array of values, followed by a new line indication. The name and values are all printed on the same line. The values are separated by commas.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the field
      values - the values of the field
      Returns:
      this printer

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the contents of the printer.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
